# Clowd Converter

> Free online file converter. Convert video, audio, and images instantly in your browser. No upload, no sign-up, completely private.

## About

Clowd Converter is a browser-based file conversion tool by Clowd Marketing. Files are processed locally using WebAssembly (FFmpeg.wasm) and Canvas API — nothing is uploaded to any server. The tool is free, requires no account, and works on any device with a modern browser.

## Supported Formats

### Video
- MP4, WebM, MOV, AVI, MKV, FLV
- Convert between any video format
- Extract audio from video (e.g., MP4 to MP3)

### Audio
- MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, FLAC, M4A
- Convert between any audio format
- Compress audio (WAV to MP3) or uncompress (MP3 to WAV)

### Image
- JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP
- Convert between any image format
- Optimize for web (PNG to WebP)

## Popular Conversions

- [Convert MP4 to MP3](https://clowdconverter.com/convert-mp4-to-mp3)
- [Convert WebM to MP4](https://clowdconverter.com/convert-webm-to-mp4)
- [Convert MOV to MP4](https://clowdconverter.com/convert-mov-to-mp4)
- [Convert PNG to JPG](https://clowdconverter.com/convert-png-to-jpg)
- [Convert JPG to PNG](https://clowdconverter.com/convert-jpg-to-png)
- [Convert PNG to WebP](https://clowdconverter.com/convert-png-to-webp)
- [Convert MP3 to WAV](https://clowdconverter.com/convert-mp3-to-wav)
- [Convert WAV to MP3](https://clowdconverter.com/convert-wav-to-mp3)
- [Convert MP4 to WebM](https://clowdconverter.com/convert-mp4-to-webm)
- [Convert Video to MP3](https://clowdconverter.com/convert-video-to-mp3)

## Key Features

- **100% Browser-Based**: Files never leave your device
- **No Sign-Up Required**: Start converting immediately
- **Free Forever**: No premium tiers, no hidden costs
- **All Devices**: Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile
- **Fast**: Image conversion is instant; audio/video uses FFmpeg.wasm
- **Private**: Zero data collection, zero tracking
